data.title: Bitcoin Top Is Not In At $126,000, According To The Business Cycle, Here’s Why
data.description:
Crypto expert Plan C has alluded to the business cycle to explain why the Bitcoin top isn’t in despite the flagship crypto’s run to $126,000 last year. This comes as BTC struggles to hold above the psychological $90,000 level, having lost most of its gains from the start of the year. Why The Bitcoin Top Isn’t In Yet Based On The Business Cycle In an X post, Plan C suggested that it doesn’t make sense to call the Bitcoin top when the business cycle hasn’t even crossed 50. The expert noted that BTC bull market peaks have historically occurred when the business cycle reaches between 55 and 65
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-top-not-in-at-126000/

data.title: Vitalik: "Corposlop" is a soulless, evil, and clumsy homogenization.
data.description: Vitalik Buterin analyzed the difference between the "corposlop web" (corporate spam web) and the "sovereign web" in a social media post. He defined "corposlop" as a combination of corporate optimization capabilities, a seemingly respectable brand image, and dishonest behavior in pursuit of profit maximization. Buterin described "corposlop" as a soulless, trend-following, and both evil and clumsy homogenization. He pointed out that the meaning of "sovereignty" has expanded to include protecting digital privacy through encryption and protecting one's mind from the psychic warfare of corporations aimed at extracting user attention and money. Buterin called on developers to build more sovereign tools, such as: 1. Privacy-preserving, native-first applications. 2. Social media platforms where users can control what they see. 3. Financial tools that help users grow wealth rather than encouraging 50x leverage or sports betting. 4. Open, privacy-focused, and native-friendly AI tools. 5. Applications, companies, and DAOs with a clear vision. Vitalik concluded by saying that sovereignty should be maintained, corposlop should be rejected, and there should be belief in something. He summarized it as: "Maintain sovereignty, reject corposlop, and believe in something."

data.title: Gate has launched "Laozi" contract trading, Gate Perp DEX, leveraged lending trading, trading robots, copy trading, instant exchange, and dollar-cost averaging features.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate.com has launched live trading of "Laozi" perpetual contracts (USDT settlement), supporting leverage from 1x to 20x. Gate Perp DEX will also be launched simultaneously. Gate.com has added unified account lending and isolated margin trading pairs for "Laozi," and simultaneously launched "Laozi" savings account management, flexible collateralized lending, and fixed-term collateralized lending functions. "Laozi" instant exchange, trading bots, copy trading, and dollar-cost averaging features are also available.

data.title: Pump.fun Co-founder: After the reform of the creator fee mechanism, the decision on fees may be left to the transaction parties.
data.description: Pump.fun co-founder Alon announced on the X platform that its Creator Fees mechanism will undergo significant changes. While the existing mechanism is effective for tokens from projects with established teams, it excessively incentivizes the creation of low-risk tokens rather than high-risk transactions, and suffers from a lack of usability and a poor user experience. Therefore, the platform will adopt a market-based approach to reform, allowing traders to decide whether a narrative deserves creator fees and how those fees should be used. Successful tokens are more likely to emerge in an environment that incentivizes trader participation, provides liquidity, generates trading volume, and encourages risk-taking. More information regarding content development and the future of the PUMP token will be released later.

data.title: HMRC orders crypto platforms to share user data amid efforts to recoup £300M in taxes
data.description:
The United Kingdom HMRC has ordered cryptocurrency exchanges to share user data as it intensifies its efforts to recoup £300 million in taxes in the new year.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hmrc-crypto-platforms-user-data-amid-taxes/

data.title: Trump says he will make Denmark’s Greenland part of the US ‘whether they like it or not’
data.description:
Trump says the U. S. will take Greenland “whether they like it or not”, warning Russia and China are already circling the island with warships and submarines. He says ownership is non-negotiable, claiming America can’t defend leased land the same way and that “you defend ownership. ” Trump also says he’s open to a deal with Denmark, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-will-make-greenland-part-of-the-us/
